name: Italian Green Beans
recipeIngredient: 1 medium onion, sliced and separated into rings
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the green beans and trim their ends and strings.
2. Add water to a depth of 1 inch in a large skillet. Bring to a boil and add the beans. Cover and reduce heat. Cook for 6-8 minutes.
3. Drain the beans and immediately place them in ice water. Let stand for 5 minutes, then drain well.
4. In the same skillet over medium-high heat, cook the onion and garlic, stirring constantly until softened.
5. Add the water, sugar, dried basil, and salt. Cook for 1-2 minutes, stirring constantly. Remove and discard the garlic. Sprinkle with grated parmesan cheese.
Yield: 3 servings.
